entry.summary:
Author: velvet_alchemist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,311Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 44

entry.title: COLOR ME, YOU
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,372Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 74

Summary: "Can you cosplay as Red Hood for me, pretty please?"How does a minor crush on the hot guy at the library lead you to ask Jason Todd to be your muse. A story about how hope when given, returns to you when you least expect it. cross posted on tumblr @luviery

entry.title: Lighters in the Darkness
entry.summary:
Author: haunted_me

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,029Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: What happens when you find something you’re not supposed to? What happens when saving the cities young savior changes your life forever? How do you fix what’s broken? How do you grow alongside the damaged and forgotten? or You save the forgotten Robin and stand by him as he grows to take over the city that failed him one too many times.

entry.title: Burning House
entry.summary:
Author: Yes_I_have_daddy_issues

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,192Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 71

Summary: We were kids together, growing up in the same crime ridden alleyways and neighborhoods, just two doors down the road from each other. “I’ll find a way.” he turned back to face me, a big smile stretching across his face, one I would never forget, the light in his eyes visible. I never saw Jason again after that night. Not in person at least. On the news, getting adopted by Bruce Wayne of all people, waving and smiling to the cameras, it never reached his eyes the way his smile always did when we were younger. Then he vanished for good.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,524Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 110

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.title: A Different Life With You
entry.summary:
Author: veena_the_aloo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,479Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 137

Summary: Jason doesn't wanna die. He really doesn't. He prays to whatever god that will listen to not let him die again.Whatever god did seem to be listening seemed to have given pity. Because when he wakes, he wakes up ten years older, in a house he doesn't recognize, married to a woman he doesn't know and with kids he's never seen. He's in another man's body. (Can be read as Reader or OC since FMC is never directly referred to by name or described)

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Justcallme_po

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,906Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

entry.title: Could you please hurry?
entry.summary:
Author: Anxyous_Potato

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,026Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Jason begged for nobody's ears. His voice was hoarse as he stared at the blinking clock on the bomb. His aching limbs couldn't move from the immense pain the was feeling. Only 14, yet always doomed to be his failure. Jason could only hope Bruce would cry on his funeral.   ------------ Heavily based on Drag Path - Twenty One Pilots, especially the bridge (would you, please, please hurry).

entry.title: The City of Black and White Turned Red
entry.summary:
Author: blessingsblessing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,928Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: This is a story that follows a military brat turned detective in one of the most dangerous, disfunctional cities in the world. One day she is met with a new case, a drug bust gone wrong. There's more than meets the eye. A dangerous anti-hero? New high tech drugs? Drug wars? Her normal crazy was going to get a lot crazier as she finds herself right in the middle of the most dangerous, world changing case in the city.

entry.summary:
Author: rockwithjoong

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,068Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: When Jason stumbles upon a shiny, unscathed car in the slums, he knows something's wrong. Inside is a fearful driver—paranoid and anxious from being stranded. Jason could ignore you, but how can he when he's a mechanic and knows how to fix your problem?

entry.summary:
Author: stqrsign

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,523Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10
